name: L'Ingénu — Co-Founder & Main Full-Stack Engineer
description: L'Ingénu is a collaborative information and expression media aiming to present news in a modular way. As co-founder and main full-stack engineer (February 2022 – January 2023), I implemented and was in charge of the whole technical stack: building the online media platform, choosing an architecture that meets business needs, and normalizing design system rules based on mockups.
